name: Brand New Games
description:
Requested!

The Spectre has gotten bored of the current games. Sure, it's amusing to watch the survivors run around getting chased, but it's become monotonous, repetitive... so it decides to make two brand new types of rounds.

Message 1: Double Trouble

All survivors have to survive 2 killers. Half the damage, half the time, half the generators, double the danger.

Message 2: One Bounce

One survivor has to survive every single killer for 1 minute.

Characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

Slasher, John Doe, Mafioso, Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, Guest 666, Doombringer, Azure.

Before y'all go and get chased by some maniacs, have a snack. :) Changing it up today.
creator: Subconscious
